#### pub fn [with\_theme](#method.with_theme)(self, theme: [Option](https://doc.rust-lang.org/nightly/core/option/enum.Option.html "enum core::option::Option")<[Theme](enum.Theme.html "enum tao::window::Theme")>) -> [WindowBuilder](struct.WindowBuilder.html "struct tao::window::WindowBuilder")

Forces a theme or uses the system settings if `None` was provided.

###### [§](#platform-specific)Platform-specific:

* **Windows**: It is recommended to always use the same theme used in [`EventLoopBuilderExtWindows::with_theme`](crate::platform::windows::EventLoopBuilderExtWindows::with_theme) for this method also or use `None` so it automatically uses the theme used in [`EventLoopBuilderExtWindows::with_theme`](crate::platform::windows::EventLoopBuilderExtWindows::with_theme) or falls back to the system preference, because [`EventLoopBuilderExtWindows::with_theme`](crate::platform::windows::EventLoopBuilderExtWindows::with_theme) changes the theme for some controls like context menus which is app-wide and can’t be changed by this method.

[Source](../../src/tao/window.rs.html#557-560)

#### pub fn [with\_background\_color](#method.with_background_color)(self, color: [RGBA](type.RGBA.html "type tao::window::RGBA")) -> [WindowBuilder](struct.WindowBuilder.html "struct tao::window::WindowBuilder")

###### [§](#platform-specific-5)Platform-specific:

* **Windows:** alpha channel is ignored. Instead manually draw the window, for example using `softbuffer` crate, see <https://github.com/tauri-apps/tao/blob/dev/examples/transparent.rs>
* **iOS / Android:** Unsupported.

Builds the window.

Possible causes of error include denied permission, incompatible system, and lack of memory.
